title: Gravion Zwei
titleNative: 超重神グラヴィオンツヴァイ
synopsis: After Gravion was able to use its ultimate attack, the Zeravire threat seemed to have temporary stopped. However when it rises back up all of a sudden, the Earth Gult and its trump card, the super robot Gravion, is needed to defend this world again. All this while, the EFA is planning to create their own weapons to counter the Zeravire, the Grand Trooper. Now as they attempt to fend off the Zeravire, the people of the Earth Gult and EFA must protect their future as well as confront their pasts, and unveil the mysteries of the Zeravire. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Fresh Precure! Omocha no Kuni wa Himitsu ga Ippai!?
titleRomaji: Fresh Precure! Omocha no Kuni wa Himitsu ga Ippai!?
titleNative: フレッシュプリキュア！ おもちゃの国は秘密がいっぱい！？
synonyms: Fresh Pretty Cure! - Le Pretty Cure nel Regno dei Giocattoli
synopsis: After resolving the problems in the Labyrinth Kingdom, Love Momozono and her friends live a happy life and continue their dance training. Suddenly, the town children's toys start to go missing and the girls agree to help find them. Love Momozono's stuffed rabbit then comes to life and tells the Cures that the Toymajin is responsible. The Fresh Pretty Cure cast then travel to the Kingdom of Toys to save the day! (Source: bakabt)

title: VOY@GER
titleNative: VOY@GER
synonyms: アイドルマスターシリーズ コンセプトムービー2021
synopsis: This is a world of the near future. The five shining stars invite you to this wonderful journey. Are you ready? To the future!!!!! A concept movie celebrating the 16th Anniversary of the THE iDOLM@STER series, directed by Atsushi Nishigori featuring the aptly titled song VOY@GER by THE IDOLM@STER FIVE STARS!!!!! The movie is animated by studio CloverWorks, with joint effort by Studio Khara on the visual production.

title: Cardcaptor Sakura the Movie 2: The Sealed Card
titleEnglish: Cardcaptor Sakura the Movie 2: The Sealed Card
titleNative: 劇場版 カードキャプターさくら 封印されたカード
synopsis: During the summer holidays, Sakura and her class are preparing to present a play at the annual Nadeshiko Festival. The unexpected arrival of Syaoran (and Meiling) give Sakura the courage to finally reciprocate her feelings. But as the cards begin to disappear one by one, Sakura discovers a single cards still remains. One with power equal to all hers... It is during this summer that Sakura faces her final battle.

synopsis: Pilot of the Vivy -Fluorite Eye’s Song- anime that was produced before the main story was made. After the show had fully aired, it was first unveiled on August 21, 2021 in WIT STUDIO's 10th Anniversary Online Talk Show #3 with featured guest and Vivy character designer loundraw. The pilot was later separately published on WIT Studio's official YouTube channel on August 24, 2021.

title: AQUARION: Myth of Emotions
titleRomaji: Sousei no Aquarion: Myth of Emotions
titleNative: 想星のアクエリオン Myth of Emotions
synonyms: Genesis of Aquarion Myth of Emotions
synopsis: The Aquarion, a giant mechanized fighting suit, is humanity’s best weapon against interstellar threats. Human pilots trained and worked together to defeat Shadow Angels, invading Abductors, and kinetic energy monsters over thousands of years. Once again, humanity must turn to the Aquarion. With the fate of the Earth hanging in the balance, will the suit be enough to save mankind? (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: The Magnificent KOTOBUKI
titleNative: 荒野のコトブキ飛行隊
synopsis: The story takes place in a barren frontier where people trade goods with each other in order to help each other survive. The Kotobuki Squadron are bodyguards for hire, led by a strict but beautiful squadron leader, an unreliable commanding officer, and a true artisan of a crew chief. Alongside pilots who don't lack for personality, they take to the air in dogfights, letting the engine noise of their Hayabusa fighters ring out in the skies. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Genesis of Aquarion OVA
titleNative: 創星のアクエリオン -裏切りの翼-
synonyms: Sousei no Aquarion: Uragiri no Tsubasa
synopsis: In a distant future there is an organization called Deava which had to fight against the so called "Shadow Angels", creatures that had survived for over 12,000 years whose only purpose was to destroy humanity. Apollo, a seemingly normal human, was in fact the reincarnation of a fallen Angel called Apollonius, who in turn had to fight against Touma, a Shadow Angel, along with his comrades in order to prevent the destruction of the Earth. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Sword Art Online Fatal Bullet -The Third Episode- Pilot-ban
titleRomaji: Sword Art Online Fatal Bullet -The Third Episode- Pilot-ban
titleNative: Sword Art Online Fatal Bullet -The Third Episode- ＜パイロット版＞
synonyms: Sword Art Online "Fatal Bullet" PS4 The Third Episode Teaser
synopsis: A special movie said to be inspired by the Sword Art Online Fatal Bullet video game. The story takes place during the Gun Gale Online arc. Bandai Namco uploaded the short to their official YouTube channel saying it was a pilot version. They are also having an open audition for the female's voice via Twitter. Users can vote for the girls by retweeting their videos (which can either be through Twitter or a link to YouTube). February 8-19 will be the first selection where the top 3 accounts retweeted are chosen. And February 21-22 will be the final selection of girls where the previous 3 accounts along with 1 account chosen by the producer are judged.

title: Modern Magic Made Simple
titleNative: よくわかる現代魔法
synopsis: Life hasn't been fair to Koyomi Morishita. Even though she's in high school, she's so short that everyone assumes she's still in grade school. The boys and girls in her school tease her mercilessly, and she's not exactly graceful either. On the other hand, she's still better off than Yumiko, who has a magician trying to kill her. Or at least Koyomi was until their paths crossed! Fortunately, salvation arrives in the form of master mage and graduate student Misa Anehara, who agrees to take Koyomi under her wing in learning the new style of magic, which breaks enchantment down into sequences of code. That'll be quite a task, given that so far Koyomi's talent seems to consist of making washbasins randomly fall out of the sky. But if it was easy, it wouldn't be magic, would it? (Source: Sentai Filmworks)

Spirit of Wonder: Miss China's Melancholy
synopsis: Miss China, a young Chinese girl, runs a restaurant in England. Dr Breckenridge and Jim are boarders that live upstairs. Unfortunately, Miss China has a problem with getting the rent from them because they spend all their money on wild inventions. The latest one allows people to travel to the moon. No one believes them, so they devise a way to prove it

title: That is the Bottleneck
titleNative: それだけがネック
synonyms: Ahí está el cuello de botella
synopsis: The employees at the Hot Hot Mart may seem a bit ordinary and mundane. From slightly unproductive chatter and everyone’s obsession with technology, to the laziness of the store manager, is everyone okay...? But everything isn’t as it seems—especially with Muto, the mysterious worker whose face is concealed and is followed by an ominous cat. Get ready to see what happens before the next shift! (Source: Funimation)

title: Ginyuu Mokushiroku Meine Liebe
titleNative: 吟遊黙示録 マイネリーベ
synopsis: The first season begins with introducing the characters, their past and their ambitions. Orpherus, Eduard, Camus, Lui and Naoji are five noblemen who attend the prestigious Rozenstolz academy, and who are a part of the Strahl class – a class for potential candidates for the advisory positions in the royal palace in the small European country of Kuchen. Isaac is an English writer who visits Kuchen. While still students, the five noblemen are forced to deal with corrupted politicians, secret agents, attempted murder and ambitious individuals from both inside and outside of school who threatens to break the fragile peace in their country, and even assassinate the king.

title: Sasami Magical Girls Club
titleNative: 砂沙美☆魔法少女クラブ
synopsis: In this world, there live a group of people who call themselves "Majo" or "Magical Girls". They hide their powers so as to assimilate into the environment. They have been living together in harmony with the humans for many years to come, and their predecessors continue to do so. Sasami was enthroned with magical powers since her birth. However, at the age of three, she was told by her parents never to use her innate powers and from then on, had kept it a secret from everyone. On the day of a new school term, a new transfer teacher by the name of Wajuu arrives and from then on, Sasami's life begins to change tremendously. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Soreyuke! Uchuu Senkan Yamamoto Youko (1999)
titleNative: それゆけ!宇宙戦艦ヤマモト・ヨーコ (1999)
synopsis: In the year 2999: humanity is split into two factions, Terra and Ness, in a war fought by starships. One of the foremost of the pilots is the cocky teenager Yamamoto Yohko, and during one of her missions, she and her crew are sucked into a temporal anomaly (a la Star Trek) that sends her back to our time. Amnesiac, she only thinks of herself as a typical high school student - until a course of events sends her back to her ship the TA-29, with her newfound friends fighting at her side in a war that looks suspiciously like an arcade game (complete with 100 yen ignition costs!). (Source: AniDB)

title: Kaze no Shoujo Emily
titleNative: 風の少女エミリー
synopsis: Based on the Emily of New Moon novel by Lucy Maud Montgomery. Emily is an orphan who gets sent to live with her relatives on Prince Edward Island, after her father dies. In New Moon she lives with her Aunt Elizabeth, Aunt Laura, and Cousin Jimmy, and learns to adapt with the help of her imagination and new friends. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Miaoshou Xiandan
titleNative: 妙手仙丹
synopsis: After the death of her adoptive family at the hands of cultivator bandits, Xie Xi Gu sets out to become a cultivator herself. The world of cultivation is a cutthroat one, biased towards those with inate talent, fortunate families, and a lot of money. What Xie Xi lacks in those three qualities, she makes up for effort... and an absurd amount of strength!

title: Shinzo
titleNative: マシュランボー
synopsis: Humanity is exterminated by a genetic race they created to fight a deadly virus. One of the scientists brings his young daughter into a cryogenic sleep, hoping that she will awaken one day and find surviving humans, so that she can bring peace between them and the genetic beings, the Enterrans. The girl, Yakumo received special powers at the impact of a meteorite, the impact after which the Enterrans went evil. When she awakens, 500 years later, she goes on her journey and meets three Enterrans who join her. Together with them she slowly finds from the secrets of the past and what happened to her home planet in reality. (Source: Anime News Network)
